name: win-local-frontend-route-check
description: Replayable Windows browser entry step for local frontend validation. Start the WSL frontend/API first, focus a Windows browser window, then replay with URL and EXPECT variables.

fingerprint.app: Chrome/Brave with address bar focus support

preconditions: The target frontend route is reachable from Windows, not only from WSL.
If the API runs in WSL, bind it on 0.0.0.0 and use the WSL IP from the Windows browser.
Use this workflow for browser focus, navigation, and route reachability; keep deep DOM/console/network assertions in the validation harness or CDP checks.
operator_notes.example: scripts/computer-workflow replay --file examples/workflows/win-local-frontend-route-check.json --var URL=http://localhost:3010/en/admin/model-settings --var EXPECT='Admin Model Control Plane'
